name: Pressure Plate
description: A floor trigger that activates when the player steps on it and deactivates when they step off. Prints on/off messages. Useful for doors, bridges, or puzzle mechanics.

customizable.activate_message: Message when stepped on (default: Plate Activated!)
customizable.deactivate_message: Message when stepped off (default: Plate Deactivated)

blueprint_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: {{blueprint_name|BP_PressurePlate}}
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: PrintString [InString="{{activate_message|Plate Activated!}}"]
NODE n3: Event_ActorEndOverlap
NODE n4: PrintString [InString="{{deactivate_message|Plate Deactivated}}"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n3.Then -> n4.Execute
